TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kungcyaci,kongcyaci == u siwkay nu nipaluma kungcyaci hali cilal, sacahamin kapah mauzip. caay katalaw tu sienaw. u cacay a mihcaay a uzip. bangcal ku balu, takuliaway atu kamaay. u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam Ś≠ĒťõÄŤŹä kongqueju u sulit nu Lipun u sulit nu Amilika saungay misapayu' a cidekay
S.PHON: == kuŇč ¶ja ¶i,koŇč ¶ja ¶i == u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma kuŇč ¶ja ¶i ńßar~…ĺi ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ, sa ¶ańßamin kapańß mauzip. ¶aaj katar~…ĺaw tu si…ônaw. u ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aaj a uzip. baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku bar~…ĺu, takur~…ĺiawaj atu kamaaj. u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam *** koŇč*u…ôju u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj
S.FORM: == kungcyaci,kongcyaci == u siwkay nu nipaluma kungcyaci hali cilal, sacahamin kapah mauzip. caay katalaw tu sienaw. u cacay a mihcaay a uzip. bangcal ku balu, takuliaway atu kamaay. u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam Ś≠ĒťõÄŤŹä kongqueju u sulit nu Lipun u sulit nu Amilika saungay misapayu' a cidekay
S.PHON: == kuŇč ¶ja ¶i,koŇč ¶ja ¶i == u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma kuŇč ¶ja ¶i ńßar~…ĺi ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ, sa ¶ańßamin kapańß mauzip. ¶aaj katar~…ĺaw tu si…ônaw. u ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aaj a uzip. baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku bar~…ĺu, takur~…ĺiawaj atu kamaaj. u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam *** koŇč*u…ôju u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj
